info.name: WhatsApp Business Management API
info.description:
The WhatsApp Business Management API enables programmatic management of WhatsApp Business Accounts, phone numbers, message templates, analytics, user assignments, product catalogs, and webhook subscriptions through the Meta Graph API.

Contact Support:
 Name: Meta Platform Support

request.description: Lists all phone numbers associated with a WhatsApp Business Account.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description: Lists all message templates for a WhatsApp Business Account.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description: Creates a new message template for a WhatsApp Business Account. Templates must be approved by Meta before they can be used to send messages.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

query.description: Specific template ID to delete a single language variant

request.description: Deletes a message template. Deleting by name removes all language variants. Pass hsm_id to delete a specific language version.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

query.description: Specific template ID to delete a single language variant

request.description: Retrieves conversation analytics for a WhatsApp Business Account.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description: Retrieves analytics for specific message templates.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description: Lists all apps subscribed to webhook events for this WABA.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description: Subscribes the current app to receive webhook events for this WABA.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description: Unsubscribes the current app from webhook events.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description: Lists all users assigned to a WhatsApp Business Account.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description: Assigns a user with specific tasks to a WhatsApp Business Account.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description: Removes a user from a WhatsApp Business Account.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description: Lists product catalogs connected to a WABA.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description: Connects a product catalog to a WABA.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description: Disconnects a product catalog from a WABA.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

query.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return

request.description: Retrieves information about a WhatsApp Business Account.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

query.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return

request.description: Updates an existing message template. Only APPROVED or PAUSED templates can be edited. Edits re-trigger the approval process.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
